## Type of change

- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` / `refactor` / `test` / `ci` — no user-facing change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npx nx run-many -t lint test build e2e` passes locally
- [ ] I did **not** hand-edit any files under `libs/*/src/` (generated code — fixed the generator and regenerated instead)
- [ ] No `console.log` left in committed code
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
